name: Agent Skills
description: Agent Skills plugin for elizaOS - implement the Agent Skills specification with progressive disclosure

SKILLS_DIR.label: Dir
SKILLS_DIR.help: Directory to install and load skills from (default: ./skills)

SKILLS_AUTO_LOAD.label: Auto Load
SKILLS_AUTO_LOAD.help: Automatically load installed skills on startup

BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIRS.label: Skills Dirs
BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIRS.help: Comma-separated list of directories containing bundled (read-only) skills

OTTO_BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIR.label: Bundled Skills Dir
OTTO_BUNDLED_SKILLS_DIR.help: Legacy: Single directory containing Otto bundled skills
